evals.prompt: how can we make the Archon VS Code extension better and what killer features should we add
evals.expected_output: A structured research report with codebase-aware recommendations, competitor analysis, citations, and honest trade-offs

assertions.text: Report references specific Archon features/code (e.g., memory system, pipeline editor, tools) — not generic advice
Report includes at least 5 numbered inline citations [N] linked to a Sources section with real URLs
Report discusses features from at least 3 competing AI coding extensions
Report provides at least 3 specific, actionable feature recommendations
Report surfaces at least 1 trade-off or counter-argument
Report follows structured format with executive summary, themed sections, and sources
